competitive_scores.overall_assessment: The Rosemount 3051 meets accuracy and temperature requirements but falls short in pressure range and lacks certifications.

technical_correlations.explanation: Higher accuracy may require more robust pressure handling capabilities, which can limit the range.
Increased temperature ranges often require stronger materials that can also handle higher pressures.

key_insights: Most products excel in accuracy but struggle with pressure range requirements.
Temperature range is generally well met across all products, indicating a strong design focus on harsh environments.
